offer: For medical clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month, inefficient intake causes delayed patient care. We provide a streamlined electronic intake system instead of manual paper forms and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient patient intake process leading to delayed patient care.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to clinics with demo video
Share insights in community forums for clinics
try_it: Let users try digital patient intake forms for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the intake workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
